ocl:
context Admission
inv: (self.discharge <> null) and (self.bed <> null)

context Payment
inv: self.amount >= 14 and self.amount <= 81

context Doctor
inv: self.appointments->any(x | x.dateTime <> '') <> null

context Procedure
inv: (self.record.patient.isInsured = true) and (not(self.record.patient.isInsured = true))

context Invoice
inv: (self.payment <> null) and (not(self.payment <> null))

context Department
inv: (self.doctors->collect(x | x.appointments)->size() >= 1) and (not(self.doctors->collect(x | x.appointments)->size() >= 1))

context Patient
inv: (self.insurance.patient.isInsured <> true) and (not(self.insurance.patient.isInsured <> true))

context Patient
inv: (self.isInsured = false) and (not(self.isInsured = false))

context Discharge
inv: (self.summary <> null) and (not(self.summary <> null))

context LabTest
inv: (self.record <> null) and (not(self.record <> null))

context Bed
inv: ((self.isOccupied = true) and (self.bedNo.toUpperCase() = 'TEST')) and (not((self.isOccupied = true) and (self.bedNo.toUpperCase() = 'TEST')))

context Procedure
inv: (self.name <> null) and (not(self.name <> null))

context Nurse
inv: ((self.shift <> null) and (self.department.oclIsTypeOf(Department))) and (not((self.shift <> null) and (self.department.oclIsTypeOf(Department))))
